sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <title_ TEIform="title">Herc.</title_> (following an author's name) = Herculaneum papyri, cited by No. of papyrus and column or fragment from <title_ TEIform="title">Herculanensium Voluminum quae supersunt, Collectio altera,</title_> Naples 1862-76, D. Bassi, <title_ TEIform="title">Herculanensium Voluminum, Collectio tertia,</title_> fasc. i, Milan 1914, and other publications; 'Epicureus <title_ TEIform="title">Herc.</title_>. . p. . . V.' refers to <title_ TEIform="title">Epicuri et Epicureorum scripta</title_>. . , ed. A. Vogliano (v. I (Add.) s.v. Epicurus).</item>
